stress_patterns.label: directed_exploration
stress_patterns.evidence: inspect-like action selected during high uncertainty

stress_patterns.label: resource_conservation
stress_patterns.evidence: recovery action selected under elevated resource pressure

stress_patterns.label: confidence_sharpening

stress_patterns.label: counterfactual_avoidance
stress_patterns.evidence: imagined-loss conflict shifted choice away from commit
